About.hero_subtitle: The most modern sports booking platform in Thailand
About.description_text: Royal Sports was born from the intention to make sports accessible to everyone. We believe that finding space for health shouldn't be difficult. That's why we develop technology that helps you find the right field and book it in seconds.
About.vision_desc: To be the heart of the sports community, connecting everyone through modern technology.
About.mission_item2: Support field owners for sustainable growth
About.story_step1_desc: Old-fashioned booking methods were difficult, requiring phone calls and uncertainty.
About.story_step2_desc: We created the most accurate and easy-to-use Real-time Booking system.
About.story_step3_desc: Today we have over 50,000 users and more than 1,200 partner fields.
About.why_item1_desc: Stable and accurate system with professional support.
About.why_item2_desc: Constantly developing new features to meet modern lifestyles.
About.why_item3_desc: Not just a booking app, but a community for true sports lovers.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Common questions and answers about using Sport Hub for players and venue owners.

questions.a1: Sport Hub is a platform for searching, booking, and managing sports venues. It allows users to choose venues, dates, and times, and make payments conveniently in one place.
questions.q2: Do I need to register before booking?
questions.a2: Users can view venues and details without logging in, but a registration or login is required to confirm a booking.
questions.q3: Can I choose the date and time myself?
questions.a3: Yes, users can select their preferred date, time, and venue from the available slots shown in the system.
questions.q4: How do I know if my booking was successful?
questions.a4: Once payment is received and confirmed, the booking status will change to 'Confirmed'. You can view details in the 'My Bookings' menu.
questions.q5: What payment methods does Sport Hub support?
questions.a5: The system supports QR Payment and other methods specified by the system periodically.
questions.q6: What if I scanned the QR but the status hasn't updated?
questions.a6: Usually, the status updates automatically within seconds. If it doesn't change, please wait a moment or contact support with your booking ID.
questions.q7: Can I pay cash at the venue?
questions.a7: This depends on the venue's conditions. For online bookings, we recommend paying through the system for complete confirmation and tracking.
questions.a8: Yes, cancellations are allowed according to system conditions. The refund amount (as credits) depends on how early you cancel before the scheduled time.
questions.a9: Booking credits are refunds from cancellations or system compensations. They can be used for future bookings under specified conditions.
questions.q10: Can booking credits be withdrawn as cash?
questions.a10: No, booking credits are for use within the Sport Hub platform only and cannot be withdrawn, transferred, or exchanged for cash.
questions.a11: Booking credits may have an expiration date. Users can check the expiry date on their account page or the checkout screen.
questions.q12: How can venue owners join the platform?
questions.a12: Owners can register for an owner account and add venue details, photos, pricing, operating hours, and more through the system.
questions.a13: Yes, owners can add offline bookings (e.g., walk-ins or phone calls) to prevent double-booking with the online system.
questions.q14: If I have staff, can I separate their access permissions?
questions.a14: Yes, owners can add staff and assign specific permissions so they see only necessary information like schedules and queue management.
questions.q15: How do venue owners receive payments?
questions.a15: Revenue is recorded in the system, and owners can view balances, request withdrawals, and track transfer history according to specified conditions.
questions.a16: Sport Hub prioritizes data security by implementing identity verification, encryption, and access control measures.
questions.q17: What should I do if I forget my password?
questions.a17: Users can use the 'Forgot Password' menu to verify their identity and set a new password.
questions.q18: Can I change my personal information?
questions.a18: Yes, users can edit certain personal details in their profile page.
questions.a19: You can reach us at support@sporthub.in.th or through the contact channels on our website.

FAQ.cta_subtitle: If you have other questions, feel free to contact our support team directly.

Blog.title: Sport Hub Blog
Blog.subtitle: Great articles about sports, health, and techniques you shouldn't miss.

post1.title: 5 Techniques for Choosing the Right Artificial Turf for Your Team
post1.excerpt: Choosing an artificial turf field isn't hard, but you need to consider several factors such as grass quality, area, and convenience...
post1.content:
Choosing a high-quality artificial turf field will make your game more fun and safe. Here are 5 key techniques:

1. Check Grass Quality: Good artificial turf should be soft and not too abrasive.
2. Drainage System: Standard fields must have good drainage to play even after rain.
3. Lighting: For night play, spotlights must be bright enough and evenly distributed.
4. Facilities: Restrooms, parking, and shops affect team convenience.
5. Price and Location: Choose a field that is easy to travel to and fits your budget.
post1.author: Admin SportHub

post2.title: Badminton Equipment Guide for Beginners
post2.excerpt: If you've just started taking interest in badminton, rackets and shoes are the heart of what you should choose correctly...
post2.content:
For beginners starting badminton, choosing the right equipment helps develop skills faster:

- Racket: Choose a lightweight racket (4U or 3U) to reduce wrist fatigue.
- Shoes: Very important! Must be specific badminton shoes to prevent ankle sprains.
- Shuttlecock: Choose durable ones with consistent flight patterns.
- Sports Apparel: Should be breathable and highly flexible for agility.
post2.author: Pro Player

post3.title: Why is Warming Up Important Before the Game?
post3.excerpt: Many might neglect warming up, but did you know it helps reduce injury risk by up to 70%...
post3.content:
Warming up is a step you should never skip:

1. Prepare Muscles: Helps increase body temperature and make muscles flexible.
2. Reduce Injury: Warming up prepares joints and tendons for impact.
3. Improve Performance: Heart and lungs gradually start working harder.
4. Mental Preparation: Helps you focus and stay concentrated on the game.
post3.author: Coach K
